case_title: KRYSTLE HARRISON VS. LYNNE C & CO., LLC, A NEW YORK LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARRISON, KRYSTLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LYNNE C & CO., LLC, A NEW YORK LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $6,222.41 PRINCIPAL, $5.86 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,433.27, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
